name: Creator Few-Shot Examples
summary: Complete creation cycle examples for creator agents

steps: Step 2 - Read the brief to understand requirements (beats, tone, constraints)
Step 3 - Create content following the brief
Step 4 - Save artifact: save_artifact(artifact_type='section', data={'title': 'The Arrival', 'content': '...prose...', 'brief_ref': 'SB-001'})
Step 5 - Note artifact ID from response: {"artifact_id": "section-001", "status": "created"}
Step 6 - Return to orchestrator: return_to_orchestrator(summary='Created section from brief SB-001', result_assessment='pass', recommendation='proceed', artifacts_produced=['section-001'])
preconditions: Received delegation with artifact_refs containing input brief

heuristics.guidance: Always reference the input artifact that guided your creation
examples: Section references its section_brief via brief_ref field
Codex entry references source sections via source_refs field

heuristics.guidance: Include ALL artifact IDs you created, not just the main one
examples: Created section and fixed another -> artifacts_produced=['section-004', 'section-001']

warnings.consequence: Orchestrator cannot pass your work to next agent
warnings.prevention: Always capture artifact_id from save_artifact response and include in return_to_orchestrator

warnings.failure_mode: Returning with description instead of ID
warnings.consequence: Next agent cannot find artifact by description
warnings.prevention: Use exact artifact IDs like 'section-001', not descriptions like 'the opening scene'
